TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Cirarokohay == u sulit nu Hulam: ŤäĚÁĒįťÉ®ŤźĹ tina niyazu' itiza i Taitung sian Chenkung cen Sansian li. naayaway a ngangan sa u Cirarokohay sananay. Cirarokohay raroko", Sayiat","Ciokakai","Vitoror Panifong"śįŹśóŹŤąáť¶¨ś≠¶Á™üÁöĄ"Fafokod"śįŹśóŹÁāļŚćĎŚćóťėŅÁĺé. u siwkay nu niyzau' i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Cirarokohay. u kasalumaluma' nu Cirarokohay sa, 213 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 575 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 408 ku tademaw, pakalatu 71%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 167 ku tademaw, pakalatu 29%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 68%, Rukay(Rukai) 1%, zumazuma 2%. tabakiay a niyazu' kuyni, duut ku tademaw, duut ku Pangcah(Amis) a tademaw. u Taitung sa u Pusung hananay nu Sakizaya a kamu, i sawaliyna-timul nu Taywan sabal. caykaw nu Sakizayaay a niyazu', u Pangcah(Amis) a niyazu' kuyni. u Pangcah(Amis) sananay, katalakaw ku uzip, matineng miadup atu mibuting. u Incumin a tademaw tu, u Pangcah(Amis) a cidekay duut ku tademaw. matineng mudadiw atu musalukiyaw ku Pangcah(Amis) . u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu,sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangbulanay. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052)
S.PHON: == ¶irarokońßaj == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** tina nijazu Ē~ ° itiza i taituŇč sian ¶ńß…ônkuŇč ¶…ôn sansian r~…ĺi. naajawaj a ŇčaŇčan sa u ¶irarokońßaj sananaj. ¶irarokońßaj raroko", sajiat"," ¶iokakai","*itoror panifoŇč"*******"fafokod"*******. u siwkaj nu nijzau Ē~ ° i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu ¶irarokońßaj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ¶irarokońßaj sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, zumazuma *%. tabakiaj a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, duut ku tad…ômaw, duut ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a tad…ômaw. u taituŇč sa u pusuŇč ńßananaj nu sakizaja a kamu, i sawar~…ĺijna-timur~…ĺ nu tajwan sabar~…ĺ. ¶ajkaw nu sakizajaaj a nijazu Ē~ °, u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) sananaj, katar~…ĺakaw ku uzip, matin…ôŇč miadup atu mibutiŇč. u in ¶umin a tad…ômaw tu, u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a ¶id…ôkaj duut ku tad…ômaw. matin…ôŇč mudadiw atu musar~…ĺukijaw ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis) . u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u,saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčbur~…ĺanaj. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Cirarokohay == u sulit nu Hulam: ŤäĚÁĒįťÉ®ŤźĹ tina niyazu' itiza i Taitung sian Chenkung cen Sansian li. naayaway a ngangan sa u Cirarokohay sananay. Cirarokohay raroko", Sayiat","Ciokakai","Vitoror Panifong"śįŹśóŹŤąáť¶¨ś≠¶Á™üÁöĄ"Fafokod"śįŹśóŹÁāļŚćĎŚćóťėŅÁĺé. u siwkay nu niyzau' i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Cirarokohay. u kasalumaluma' nu Cirarokohay sa, 213 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 575 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 408 ku tademaw, pakalatu 71%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 167 ku tademaw, pakalatu 29%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 68%, Rukay(Rukai) 1%, zumazuma 2%. tabakiay a niyazu' kuyni, duut ku tademaw, duut ku Pangcah(Amis) a tademaw. u Taitung sa u Pusung hananay nu Sakizaya a kamu, i sawaliyna-timul nu Taywan sabal. caykaw nu Sakizayaay a niyazu', u Pangcah(Amis) a niyazu' kuyni. u Pangcah(Amis) sananay, katalakaw ku uzip, matineng miadup atu mibuting. u Incumin a tademaw tu, u Pangcah(Amis) a cidekay duut ku tademaw. matineng mudadiw atu musalukiyaw ku Pangcah(Amis) . u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu,sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangbulanay. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat S.PHON: == ¶irarokońßaj == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** tina nijazu Ē~ ° itiza i taituŇč sian ¶ńß…ônkuŇč ¶…ôn sansian r~…ĺi. naajawaj a ŇčaŇčan sa u ¶irarokońßaj sananaj. ¶irarokońßaj raroko", sajiat"," ¶iokakai","*itoror panifoŇč"*******"fafokod"*******. u siwkaj nu nijzau Ē~ ° i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu ¶irarokońßaj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ¶irarokońßaj sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, *ukaj(*ukai) *%, zumazuma *%. tabakiaj a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, duut ku tad…ômaw, duut ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a tad…ômaw. u taituŇč sa u pusuŇč ńßananaj nu sakizaja a kamu, i sawar~…ĺijna-timur~…ĺ nu tajwan sabar~…ĺ. ¶ajkaw nu sakizajaaj a nijazu Ē~ °, u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) sananaj, katar~…ĺakaw ku uzip, matin…ôŇč miadup atu mibutiŇč. u in ¶umin a tad…ômaw tu, u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) a ¶id…ôkaj duut ku tad…ômaw. matin…ôŇč mudadiw atu musar~…ĺukijaw ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis) . u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u,saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčbur~…ĺanaj. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma
